app.title: NOIA2
app.description: A floating utility companion built with Tauri, React, and Rust.

greet.title: Greet from Rust
greet.description: Test the communication between frontend and Tauri backend

about.title: About
about.description: A floating desktop helper for NOIA2.

general.title: General
general.description: Manage theme, language, and global shortcuts.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the appearance and language of the app
appearance.mainWindowDescription: Main window and DPS window are stored separately so we can tune them independently.
appearance.backgroundColorDescription: Controls the shell color used for the main window surface.
appearance.backgroundOpacityDescription: Keeps room to make the main window more solid or more glass-like later.
appearance.dpsWindowDescription: These settings directly affect the floating DPS window and the preview below uses mock data.
appearance.autoResizeHeightDescription: Automatically adjusts the DPS window height to its current content.
appearance.showHeaderStatsDescription: Controls whether the compact damage, participants, and target cards are shown above the panel.
appearance.scaleFactorDescription: Changes the compactness of the floating DPS tool.
appearance.previewDescription: Mock combat data is used here so you can preview color, scale, panel opacity, and header visibility.

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.showMainDesc: Use shortcut to quickly show the main window
shortcut.showDpsDesc: Use shortcut to quickly open or focus the DPS window
shortcut.resetDpsDesc: Use shortcut to reset DPS meter runtime data without stopping it

dps.title: DPS Meter
dps.description: Configure backend DPS snapshot frequency, debug logging, and combat filtering rules.
dps.snapshotIntervalDescription: How often the backend sends DPS snapshots to the frontend, in milliseconds.
dps.memorySnapshotIntervalDescription: How often the backend sends memory, CPU, ping, and buffer diagnostics to the frontend, in milliseconds.
dps.maxPacketSizeThresholdDescription: Limit used by backend packet handling.
dps.enableResyncOnStallDescription: If packet parsing stays stuck at the same buffer head for too long, automatically skip one byte and try to resync.
dps.resyncDelayDescription: How long the parser can remain stalled at offset 0 before forcing a single-byte resync.
dps.bossOnlyDescription: Only count damage against targets that are recognized as bosses.
dps.myMuzhuangOnlyDescription: When the target is a training dummy, only count damage dealt by your own character.
dps.percentDisplayModeDescription: Choose whether the list percent shows contribution against target max HP or damage share against total team damage.
dps.outputDebugLogDescription: Write additional DPS capture and dispatcher debug logs to the backend log file.

supportPage.title: Supports
supportPage.description: Support the project and browse the people and technologies behind it.
supportPage.supportDescription: If this app helps you, you can support continued development here.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.description: App information, support options, and local cache management.
aboutPage.supportDescription: If this app helps you, you can support continued development here.
aboutPage.technicalAcknowledgementsDescription: See the technologies and open-source projects that power the app.
aboutPage.technicalAcknowledgementsDialogDescripti: Special thanks to the tools, frameworks, and libraries that make this project possible.
aboutPage.sponsorAcknowledgementsDescription: See the supporters who help keep the project moving.
aboutPage.sponsorAcknowledgementsDialogDescription: We are grateful to everyone who has supported the project.
aboutPage.noAcknowledgements: No acknowledgements have been added yet.
aboutPage.supportDialogDescription: Scan the WeChat QR code below to support ongoing development and maintenance of the app.
aboutPage.supportDialogMissingHint: Put your QR image at {{path}} and it will show up here automatically.
aboutPage.supportDialogThanks: Your support helps us keep improving parsing, overlays, history tools, and desktop stability. Thank you for helping the project keep moving.
aboutPage.clearCacheDescription: This clears all localStorage data for the app, including history, preferences, language, and theme.
aboutPage.clearDialogDescription: This will remove all localStorage data for the app, including DPS history, main character history, settings, language, and theme. The page will reload after clearing.

panel.title: Live DPS Panel
panel.waitingHint: Start the meter and lock onto a target to populate this panel.

detail.selectPlayer: Select a player from the DPS list

prompts.confirmRelease: Continue with version update and tag creation?
prompts.pushNow: Push commit and tag to remote now?

messages.invalidChoice: Invalid choice, defaulting to patch release.
messages.pushSkipped: Skipped push. You can push later with:

errors.cargoVersionNotFound: Failed to locate version in Cargo.toml

errors.cargoLockVersionNotFound: Failed to locate version in Cargo.lock
errors.releaseStagingIncomplete: Release staging is incomplete. Staged files: {{stagedFiles}}
errors.workingTreeNotClean: Working tree is not clean. Please commit or stash your changes first.

errors.branchNotMain: Releases must be created from the main branch. Current branch: {{branch}}

errors.tauriVersionInvalid: src-tauri/tauri.conf.json version is missing or invalid

signUp.confirmationText: Registration successful. Check your email and open the link on this device to complete verification.
signUp.description: Create a new account to unlock cloud-based features later.

forgottenPassword.confirmationText: Check your email and open the reset link on this device.
forgottenPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.

magicLink.confirmationText: Check your email for the magic link.

updatePassword.confirmationText: Your password has been updated successfully.
updatePassword.description: Set a new password to complete account recovery.

feedback.deepLinkFailed: Failed to process the email link. Please try again.
feedback.recoveryReady: Verification complete. You can now set a new password.
feedback.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect, or the email has not been verified yet.
